name: @janilowski/xmpp-client
description: An XMPP client library for the modern web.

scripts.prosody:setup: cd server && prosodyctl --config prosody.cfg.lua install mod_sasl2 && prosodyctl --config prosody.cfg.lua install mod_sasl2_bind2 && prosodyctl --config prosody.cfg.lua install mod_sasl2_sm && prosodyctl --config prosody.cfg.lua install mod_sasl2_fast && test -f modules/share/lua/*/mod_sasl2/mod_sasl2.lua && test -f modules/share/lua/*/mod_sasl2_bind2/mod_sasl2_bind2.lua && test -f modules/share/lua/*/mod_sasl2_sm/mod_sasl2_sm.lua && test -f modules/share/lua/*/mod_sasl2_fast/mod_sasl2_fast.lua
scripts.size: bun run build && bun run bundlesize
scripts.test:all: bun run test:unit && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run build && bun run bundlesize
scripts.ci: bun install --frozen-lockfile && bun run test:unit && bun run lint && bun run typecheck && bun run build && bun run bundlesize && bun run prosody:setup && bun run server:restart && bun run test:e2e && bun run test:browser
scripts.clean: bun run server:stop ; rm -f server/localhost.key server/localhost.crt server/prosody.err server/prosody.log server/prosody.pid lerna-debug.log ; rm -rf server/modules server/.cache node_modules dist
